HomePage.resume: I am a passionate security engineer with a strong focus on network infrastructure design and vulnerability analysis. I specialize in network security and server infrastructure, with hands-on experience in tools like Wireshark, Metasploit, and Nmap. Skilled in operating Kali Linux, Ubuntu, and Rocky Linux environments for server deployment and security tasks. I am committed to responsible security practices, continuously growing my knowledge to protect systems and contribute to a safer digital environment.

services.title: I want to work in Security
services.sub_title: Aspiring systems engineer passionate about infrastructure and security

main_card.title: Dedicated to Web Security
main_card.description: I want to grow as a security engineer through hands-on infrastructure and security projects, and help organizations stay secure.

pentest.title: Systems Engineering
pentest.description: Hybrid cloud infrastructure design and operations using KVM, Hyper-V, Docker, Kubernetes, and AWS

network.title: Network & System Security
network.description: Network traffic analysis with Wireshark, Linux server administration (Kali, Ubuntu, Rocky Linux)

1.title: High-Availability Infrastructure for Disaster Recovery
1.description: Designed and built an enterprise-grade high-availability infrastructure connecting head office and branches via VPN, with OSPF-based hierarchical routing, HSRP gateway redundancy, and MySQL Master-Slave replication to ensure service continuity during failures.

2.title: Virtualization-Based VM Academy Infrastructure & Security
2.description: Designed and deployed a multi-site hybrid cloud infrastructure connecting four locations (Seoul HQ, Yeongdeungpo, Incheon, Gyeonggi) via VPN using KVM, Hyper-V, VMware (ESXi), Docker, Kubernetes, and AWS. Integrated on-premises virtualization with AWS multi-VPC architecture, configuring AD/DNS/DHCP, HAProxy load balancing, and Auto Scaling per site.

3.title: Design Sharing & Community Website
3.description: A platform for designers to share their work and build community. Features portfolio uploads, likes, comments, and real-time chat for communication. Built with Firebase for real-time database and Zustand for state management to provide a smooth user experience.
3.content: A comprehensive platform for designers that integrates work sharing, community, and portfolio features.

4.title: Personal Portfolio Website
4.description: A modern and responsive personal portfolio website for developers. Features dark mode, multi-language support, animation effects, and effectively showcases projects and tech stack.
4.content: A portfolio website that effectively showcases developer skills and projects.

5.title: Course Registration App UI/UX Redesign
5.description: A mobile application that improves the complex UI of existing school course registration systems to be more user-friendly. Built with Flutter for cross-platform support and intuitive interface. Includes timetable visualization, search filtering, and favorites functionality.
5.content: A mobile app redesign project to improve students' course registration experience.

6.title: E-commerce Shopping Mall
6.description: The first e-commerce website I developed, built with PHP and MySQL. Implemented basic shopping mall features including product management, shopping cart, order system, and member management. Also includes admin panel and payment systems (PayPal, credit cards).
6.content: My first shopping mall project developed while learning the basics of e-commerce.

7.title: Database Backup Program
7.description: A desktop application responsible for automatic backup and restoration of enterprise databases. Developed with C# and .NET Framework, includes scheduling, compression, and encryption features. Supports various databases (MySQL, SQL Server, PostgreSQL).
7.content: A professional tool for secure backup and restoration of enterprise data.

resume.paragraf_1: Hello! Thank you for visiting my portfolio. My name is Baek Seunghak. I studied Computer Engineering at Hallym University, building a solid foundation in computer science and systems. I have a deep passion for web security and penetration testing, and I am actively working toward a career in the cybersecurity field.
resume.paragraf_2: My focus is on network security, including vulnerability assessment, infrastructure hardening, and security analysis. I am proficient with Kali Linux, Ubuntu, and Rocky Linux, and I utilize tools such as Wireshark, Nmap, and Metasploit for network analysis and security testing. I also have experience in database management and server administration with MariaDB and MySQL.
resume.paragraf_3: I believe that staying curious and continuously learning are essential in the ever-evolving security landscape. I am dedicated to responsible security practices. I look forward to contributing to a security-focused team, strengthening infrastructure security, and growing as a professional in the information security industry!
